skills.name: Quick Slash
skills.description: A fast weapon strike with a small crit bonus.

skills.name: Heavy Cleave
skills.description: A heavy attack that deals increased damage but costs stamina.

skills.name: Guard Break
skills.description: Damages enemies and lowers their defense for a turn.

skills.description: A leadership burst that damages and may intimidate weak enemies.

skills.name: Storm Counter
skills.description: A high-level counter technique unlocked near Loguetown.
